victim.value: Destiny's family (mother, father, baby brother Elijah) killed in car accident, but unclear if criminal
victim.quote: Rose Donaldson lost her son-in-law, daughter, and baby grandson a little less than a week ago

social_world.value: Small-town class divide between wealthy estate owners and trailer park residents, with historical family prominence
social_world.quote: her father, the Honorable Judge Frost, was one of the most prominent men in town

investigator_wound.value: Destiny's trauma from witnessing family's death creates psychological vulnerability to supernatural experiences
investigator_wound.quote: I keep seeing Mom's severed head lying in the street looking at me like she wants me to do something
